default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, strategy, and new tool access.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content quality is improving;** feedback is now focused on minor structural issues, not core positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**A full content refresh is planned** to eliminate outdated messaging (e.g., "automation") and align all content with current positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**The "How to Build an AI Agent" guide will be a pillar cluster** on a new `/guides` URL, supported by linked articles to maximize SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Direct access to Check That Access,** GrowthX's AI visibility tool, is now available for Logic to self-manage and track AI search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Quality

  - [Feedback is now focused on minor structural issues (e.g., sentence case in FAQs), indicating significant progress on core content quality and Logic's positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [**Decision:** A full content refresh is required to eliminate outdated messaging (e.g., "automation") and ensure brand consistency, even if it means losing search volume on older, misaligned articles.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [The Notion content strategy doc is updated with keyword-validated technical topics. Azzam will review and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [A new Airtable column will be added for granular topic prioritization ("hell yeah" vs. "yeah") to better align content creation with current priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)

### "How to Build an AI Agent" Guide Strategy

  - [**Plan:** The guide will be a pillar cluster, not a microsite. It will live on a new `/guides` URL and link to supporting articles (use cases, case studies) to build topic authority and pass SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Logic's Goal:** Elevate the guide as a premium brand asset for the sales pipeline, using a dedicated URL and a 301-redirected vanity domain (e.g., `howtobuildanagent.com`).](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Bailey will confirm if Logic's plan requires any strategic adjustments before Azzam reviews the detailed keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Analytics & Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Track content-driven signups to measure conversion and inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [**Action:** Azzam will investigate if StatSig can provide this data and then grant access to the GrowthX team email.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [**Context:** Signups are currently low, so this is a long-term infrastructure project.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Check That Access Tool

  - [Bailey demoed Check That Access, GrowthX's new tool for tracking AI search visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Overview:** Competitive presence, AI response position, sentiment, citation share.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**Prompts:** Track custom prompts or add from a library to get \~1 month of historical data instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1696.0)
      - [**Sources:** Identify top-cited articles and domains to understand the organic competitive landscape.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will provide direct access and export current prompts to a Google Sheet for easier editing.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)

      - [Confirm the "AI Agent" pillar strategy with the team, given Logic's plan for a `/guides` URL.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Provide direct access to Check That Access and export prompts to a Google Sheet.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [Prepare a recap doc for the engagement check-in scheduled for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
      - [Review the updated Notion content strategy doc and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Investigate StatSig's capabilities for tracking content-driven signups and grant access.](https://fathom.video/share/kMNE1Z_SiYH_GauiEpWbskobWjyjHFRy?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
